title: Stylized Items
description: Adds 75+ new item cosmetics. Rename an item and watch the texture update in real time!
body:
Get New Item Cosmetics By Renaming Certain Items Into New Names And Watch Them Change In Real Time!


## **Dependencies**

**Stylized Items** for Minecraft 1.21.5+ doesn't have any dependencies except for the Ruby Armor that requires OptiFine.

Minecraft pre-1.21.5 requires **OptiFine** or a simular mod that enables CIT.

![Some of The Items](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/hyS3L9T0/images/7554381bdeac4a9b28ab3ebdc1f880a8fce5bcd9.png)

> # Version 2.0.0:
> ## **Getting the Items**
> The name at the top of each category is the base item and all of the bullet points are the different item name!
> 
> ### Wooden Sword
>  
> - Wooden Dagger
> - Wooden Spear
> - Wooden Nunchucks
> - Pencil
> - Red pinwheel
> - Blue pinwheel
> - Yellow pinwheel
> - Green pinwheel
>  
> 
> ### Stone Sword
> 
> - Stone Dagger
> - Stone Spear
> - Stone Battle Axe
> - Flint Spear
> 
> 
> ### Copper Sword
> - Copper Dagger
> - Copper Spear
> - Copper Battle Axe
> 
> 
> ### Iron Sword
> 
> - Iron Dagger
> - Iron Spear
> - Iron Battle Axe
> - Medieval Great Sword
> - Red Candy Cane Sword
> - Blue Candy Cane Sword
> - Green Candy Cane Sword
> - Yellow Candy Cane Sword
> - Rainbow Candy Cane Sword

>

> ### Diamond Sword
> 
> - Diamond Dagger
> - Diamond Spear
> - Diamond Battle Axe
> - Ruby Sword
> - Ruby Dagger
> - Ruby Spear
> - Rainbow Sword
> 
>  
> 
> ### Diamond Armor/Tools
> 
> - **Diamond Pickaxe:** Ruby Pickaxe
> - **Diamond Axe:** Ruby Axe
> - **Diamond Shovel:** Ruby Shovel
> - **Diamond Hoe:** Ruby Hoe
> - **Diamond Helmet:** Ruby Helmet - _OptiFine Required_
> - **Diamond Chestplate:** Ruby Chestplate - _OptiFine Required_
> - **Diamond Leggings:** Ruby Leggings - _OptiFine Required_
> - **Diamond Boots:** Ruby Boots - _OptiFine Required_
> 
> 
> 
> ### Golden Sword
> 
> - Golden Dagger
> - Golden Spear
> - Golden Battle Axe
> - Glass Sword
>  
> 
> ### Netherite Swords
>  
> 
> - Netherite Dagger
> - Netherite Spear
> - Netherite Battle Axe
> - Bedrock Sword
> - Bedrock Spear
> - The Pointless Stick
> - Bananapantz's hand
> - Steve's Hand
> - Joecraft56's Hand
> 
>  
> 
> ### Food/Drinks
>  
> - **Sweet berries:** Tomato
> - **Sweet berries:** Strawberry
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Milk
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Apple Juice
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Orange Juice
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Grape Juice
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Fruit Smoothie
> - **Bucket of Milk:** _Cup of Cocktail_ or _Cup of Mocktail_
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Eggnog
> - **Bucket of Milk:** Cup of Lemonade
> - **Melon Slice:** Cantaloupe Slice
> - **Melon Slice:** Honeydew Slice
> - **Cookie:** Red Candy Cane
> - **Cookie:** Blue Candy Cane
> - **Cookie:** Green Candy Cane
> - **Cookie:** Yellow Candy Cane
> - **Cookie:** Rainbow Candy Cane
> - **Apple:** Banana
> - **Apple:** Lemon


> ### Furniture - `Rename a Stick for the following items`
> - **Night Stands** _`(ex: "Spruce Night Stand", "Stripped Mangrove Night Stand", "Warped Night Stand")`_
> - **Bedframe** for every wood type _`(ex: "Oak Bedframe", "Cherry Bedframe")`_
> - **Wool Chair** For Every Wool Color _`(ex: "Red Wool Chair")`_


> ### Miscellaneous
> - Diamond: Ruby


> # Pre-mc1.21.5 (v1.5.0):

> - Bedrock tools require unbreaking III
> - Ruby Armor (Works Automatically)
> - The Gray Chicken

>
